production_objective: Convert approved 46 Montreal search packs into operator-authorized public-web discovery requests, policy-evaluated crawl manifests, preserved public-page and archive captures, accepted evidence artifacts, registered source records, and reviewed v37 import candidates without private-account access, circumvention, hidden collection, automatic scope expansion, truth assignment, entity merge, claim approval, dossier mutation, export, or publication.

roadmap.capability: planning, compatibility, privacy, legal-safety, schema ownership, and non-duplication gate
case-scoped discovery request and crawl-manifest contract bound to v29 jobs and policies
source allowlist, direct-relevance, robots, terms, public-access, rejected-query, and resource-limit evaluation
passive Common Crawl and Internet Archive index discovery with candidate-URL review
operator-triggered official/public HTTP crawler adapter with strict scope, rate, depth, redirect, and content controls
operator-triggered Browsertrix capture for approved JavaScript-heavy public pages with WARC/WACZ and screenshot preservation
capture acceptance, v29 artifact ingestion, v36 source registration, and complete provenance manifests
duplicate, mirror, change, relevance, and scope triage with explicit handoff to v37 imports
integrated public-discovery workspace, execution/recovery visibility, and browser E2E safety proof
controlled fictional 46 Montreal pilot, exact release evidence, and program closure

authoritative_reuse.case_scope_and_privacy: existing case, purpose, authorization, minimization, sensitive-context, retention, privacy, and 46 Montreal scope controls
authoritative_reuse.search_pack: existing config/search_packs/46_montreal_keywords.yaml terms, identifiers, authority queries, and Cowdy exclusions
authoritative_reuse.public_source_policy: existing config/crawlers/46_montreal_public_sources.yaml source tiers, crawler gate, limits, outputs, and rejection rules
authoritative_reuse.collection_jobs: v29.1 collection-job contracts and state machine
authoritative_reuse.collection_policy: v29.2 authorization, scope, source-class, deny-rule, validity, and expiry evaluation
authoritative_reuse.adapter_contract: v29.3 connector normalization and adapter identity contracts
authoritative_reuse.artifact_evidence: v29.4 accepted artifacts, hashes, acquisition bindings, and custody history
authoritative_reuse.action_execution: v35 issued action contracts, durable execution ledger, result envelopes, reconciliation, and recovery observability
authoritative_reuse.source_registry: v36.1 source records, capture integrity, and claim-type reliability
authoritative_reuse.operational_imports: v37.1 and v37.2 import envelopes, deterministic records, duplicate detection, and quarantine
authoritative_reuse.analyst_workflow: v37.3 through v37.8 scope review, explicit promotion, chronology, dossier readiness, and read-only workspace
authoritative_reuse.search_reporting: existing search, watchlist, reporting, and history services without creating a second monitoring authority
authoritative_reuse.audit: append-only AuditLog and exact event hashes
authoritative_reuse.export_and_publication: existing redaction, quality, approval, bundle, manifest, export, and publication gates
